reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Crystal Water Monitor
reauth_confirm.description: Your Crystal Water Monitor API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key to continue.

user.title: Connect to Crystal Water Monitor
user.description: In order to use this integration you'll need to obtain a Crystal Connect API key. [Follow this link to learn how to get an API key.]({api_key_url})

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check your key and try again.
error.no_subscription: No active subscription. You must have an active Crystal Water Monitor subscription to use the Connect API.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Crystal API. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Crystal Water Monitor Settings
init.description: Update your API key or environment. [Get an API key]({api_key_url})

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check your key and try again.
error.no_subscription: No active subscription. You must have an active Crystal Water Monitor subscription to use the Connect API.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Crystal API. Check your internet connection.

auth_error.message: Authentication failed. Go to Settings → Devices & Services → Crystal Water Monitor and re-enter your API key.
